channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin longs soar despite weak US macroeconomic data: Is $82K BTC next?
item.description: Data shows Bitcoin traders cutting short positions and going long despite concerning US macroeconomic data emerging. Is a rally toward $82,000 next?

item.title: Nearly $500B in Bitcoin Is Exposed to Future Quantum Computing Attacks: Glassnode
item.description: Blockchain data firm Glassnode mapped the vulnerabilities embedded in Bitcoin’s existing supply, pointing to exchanges as a weak point.

item.title: Prominent Ethereum Dev Proposes $1 Billion ETH Organization With Leader Who 'Wants to Fight'
item.description: Former Ethereum Foundation researcher Dankrad Feist appeared to take pointed shots Thursday at ETH co-founder Vitalik Buterin.

item.title: Harvard dumps entire ETH position after just one quarter
item.description: Harvard's endowment fund has become one of the latest high-profile holders to liquidate its ETH as investor sentiment sours during the ongoing bear market.

item.title: Spotify and Universal Launch AI Remix Tool for Fan-Made Covers
item.description: Spotify and Universal Music Group say their new licensed AI remix platform will let fans create song covers and remixes while compensating participating artists and songwriters.

item.title: DeepSeek Is Building Its Own Claude Code. Beijing Wants the Whole Stack
item.description: The Chinese AI lab already powers coding agents worldwide. Now it wants to own the tool developers use to run them.

item.title: Young Adults Involved in AI Romance Hide Full Use From Partners 69% of the Time
item.description: Researchers found regular AI companion use among partnered young adults was linked to lower relationship stability and communication quality.

item.title: Crypto PAC backed by Anchorage and Chainlink announces endorsements for 2026 midterms
item.description: Federal Election Commission filings showed only $175,000 in contributions to the hybrid PAC, which could influence US voters through media buys before key elections in several states.

item.title: Chance of new Bitcoin lows ‘extremely slim’ as long-term holders’ supply tops 15M BTC
item.description: Data suggest Bitcoin’s chance of dropping below $60,000 again is slim to none, thanks to longer-term investors holding more than 71% of the asset’s total supply.

item.title: Binance launches SpaceX-linked perpetual futures ahead of IPO
item.description: The crypto exchange's new pre-IPO futures product lets traders speculate on SpaceX’s expected public market valuation before the company begins trading on public exchanges.

item.title: NHL Agrees to Share Data With the CFTC for Prediction Market Integrity
item.description: The agreement ensures the regulator and the NHL communicate and share data to protect the integrity of hockey-related prediction markets.

item.title: Mark Cuban Says He Sold Most of His Bitcoin
item.description: Outspoken billionaire Mark Cuban is disappointed with Bitcoin's performance, and said he's parted ways with most of the BTC in his portfolio.

item.title: Satoshi’s 1.1 million bitcoin and millions more can be saved from quantum attack, says expert
item.description: Researchers at the privacy-centric blockchain startup say their multi-layer quantum defense will feature a soft fork to freeze and protect dormant BTC.

item.title: Petition to scrap South Korea's crypto tax reaches 50K threshold
item.description: Critics say the new 22% crypto tax, set to take effect in 2027, unfairly favors other asset classes with a much lower tax burden.

item.title: JUST IN: Billionaire Mark Cuban says he sold "most" of his Bitcoin. "Bitcoin has lost the plot." - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1iUlAwd2hoZDk1MzJucTRBT2p0VVRDVktMZTlhc0h0RnNNd1hKcVNfOV9BYlh6aGFYaG9XSVlpRG5pUm1lT2Vfdy1iSmdHcGl6WDdkY1ZxTC1LLTRTMC1RZ2pR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Billionaire Mark Cuban sa…

item.title: CFTC signs MOU with National Hockey League over prediction markets
item.description: The financial regulator signed a similar agreement with Major League Baseball in March and continues to file lawsuits against state-level authorities going after prediction market platforms over sports betting.

item.title: Proposed ARMA Bill Aims to Enshrine Strategic Bitcoin Reserve Into Law
item.description: The American Reserve Modernization Act would direct the Treasury to create and maintain a Bitcoin reserve for a minimum of 20 years.

item.title: Trump Halts AI Order Over Fears It Could Hurt US Edge Over China
item.description: Trump said he delayed the order because parts of the proposal risked slowing the U.S. AI industry as competition with China intensifies.

item.title: BREAKING 🚨: Ethereum Harvard dumps entire $ETH position worth $87 Million 🤯👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE1WcEx2Yk5FZm9DNWpvRi11Mm42ZDNIYU9GLWRQb1dKSVJ3U2pob3RCN0JVeHdxYTM3UnkzTGJlY0lXc1g5c1Y5dXBWNjF0MlNHa2hoTVdPRDFBRld6OXc?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING 🚨: Ethereum Harvard dumps ent…

item.title: Ethereum Crypto Influencer Game 'Fantasy Top' Shutting Down
item.description: Fantasy Top, a game that reimagines fantasy sports through the lens of Crypto Twitter, will close down two years after its hot launch.

item.title: Nvidia Beats, Stock Dumps—BofA Says Buy the Dip
item.description: Record $81.6 billion in revenue for Nvidia—and yet the stock fell. Bank of America called the dip noise and raised its price target.

item.title: Blockchain.com confidentially submits IPO filing with SEC
item.description: The crypto services company began the US IPO process as companies across the digital asset sector weigh public market debuts.

item.title: Mark Cuban says he sold most of his Bitcoin after failed hedge narrative 'disappointed' the billionaire
item.description: The billionaire investor said he sold most of his bitcoin after concluding the cryptocurrency failed to act as a hedge during recent geopolitical turmoil and dollar weakness.

item.title: US Government Makes $2 Billion Bet on Quantum Computing as Threat to Bitcoin Grows
item.description: The U.S. Department of Commerce will invest $2 billion into quantum chip foundries and startups as the "Q-Day" Bitcoin threat nears.

item.title: Ethereum’s identity crisis is deepening after high-profile 'brain drain' frustrates the community
item.description: What began earlier this week as shock over more exits of core figures has now evolved into something more existential, according to some community members.

item.title: Crypto Exchange Kraken Secures VARA License to Launch in Dubai
item.description: Dubai's Virtual Asset Regulatory Authority granted Kraken’s parent company preliminary broker-dealer and investment management authorization.

item.title: Bitcoin accumulation trends weaken as realized losses jump to $600M
item.description: Bitcoin whales and investors shift to distribution as realized losses surge past $600 million, as BTC price declines toward $76,000.

item.title: Bitcoin due '5%+' move as analysis stays bullish on BTC price outlook
item.description: Bitcoin should shift 5% or more "soon" with $77,000 staying the focus amid mixed messages over the latest US-Iran peace deal plans.

item.title: 'The Sandbox' Co-Founder's Wife Targeted in Crypto Kidnapping Attempt: Report
item.description: France has become an epicenter of so-called “wrench attacks” targeting crypto executives and their families.

item.title: Crypto prediction markets are turning into dangerous national security risks, and Congress wants to ban them
item.description: Bubblemaps investigators led by Nicolas Vaiman, discovered 80 bets on Polymarket with a 98% win rate that he said is statistically impossible to achieve.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Congressman Nick Begich is introducing new legislation to establish a U.S. Strategic Bitcoin Reserve, Fox Business reports. The bill "has bipartisan support and more than a dozen co-sponsors in Congress" 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9tNVBZSzI0cXlJbW04X0Z2TlZTbl9Xa1FxTkpTRW5TWXp4NzFoREZqZE9pNjN0ZlpoYmpwbVlIVC1EeDBEMjFZTHpyWUZuYjhPQVZkTWszZGRxT0FqSVZ4bE5ZYkZMN00?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Congressman N…

item.title: U.S. CFTC secures deal with National Hockey League on prediction market safeguards
item.description: A new arrangement has been set between the derivatives regulator and professional hockey, following on the heels of a similar baseball agreement.

item.title: Crypto for Advisors: Crypto Products
item.description: Advisors need to assess ETP custody, sponsor profiles, and fees. Read expert advice on bitcoin-backed loans, including margin call risks and when to sell vs. borrow.

item.title: Crypto Exchange Blockchain.com Files for IPO in the US
item.description: Long-running crypto exchange Blockchain.com has confidentially filed to take its business public via the U.S. markets.

item.title: IG Europe taps Bitpanda to expand crypto trading across Europe
item.description: IG Group, which launched spot crypto in the UK last year, is bringing the service to European investors through Bitpanda’s infrastructure.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Bitcoin ATM Firm CoinFlip Blasts 'Meritless' Lawsuit as Missouri Demands Restitution for Seniors
item.description: Missouri's top prosecutor accused Bitcoin ATM operator CoinFlip of “knowingly facilitating fraudulent transactions.”

item.title: MoonPay expands into tokenized assets and DeFi markets with new platform for banks
item.description: With MoonPay Trade, the crypto payments firm is building infrastructure for banks, fintechs to access stablecoins, tokenized funds and yield in a one-stop shop.

item.title: Syndicate Labs Shuts Down as Crypto Cuts and Closures Mount
item.description: The shutdown is the latest in a wave of crypto and tech cutbacks driven by weaker demand, tighter funding, and AI pivots.

item.title: Why DeFi Keeps Losing Millions to Exploits
item.description: DeFi exploits keep piling up in 2026. Here’s what experts say is behind crypto’s security crisis—and how it can be fixed.

item.title: Peer-to-peer trading startup Variational raises $50 million for real-world perps in funding round led by Dragonfly
item.description: The company is initially offering perpetual futures on real-world assets including oil, silver, copper and gold.

item.title: Live markets: Yet another Iran peace deal and Mark Cuban sells his bitcoin
item.description: Hyperliquid's HYPE is the outlier in crypto, rising 16.5% over the past 24 hours to a new record high.

item.title: Blockchain.com files with SEC for U.S. IPO
item.description: The crypto financial services firm submitted a draft S-1 to the SEC as it explores a public listing amid renewed momentum in digital asset markets.

item.title: Hyperliquid whale won’t close HYPE short despite $22M unrealized loss
item.description: HYPE’s rally is flashing exhaustion near its record-high resistance, raising the risk of a 20% pullback toward the $51.5–$45 support zone.

item.title: Kraken moves closer to UAE launch after Dubai regulatory approval
item.description: Kraken’s parent company, Payward, received preliminary approval from Dubai's VARA, paving the way for UAE dirham funding, margin and OTC trading and institutional access via Kraken Prime.

item.title: US sanctions Sinaloa cartel-linked Ethereum addresses
item.description: OFAC sanctioned six Ethereum addresses linked to a Sinaloa Cartel money laundering network allegedly converting drug proceeds into crypto.

item.title: Bitcoin's long-term holder supply approaches record high, breaking multi-year downtrend
item.description: Long-term holder supply has surged by more than 2 million coins to 16.3 million BTC during the current bear market.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Internet Computer drops 1.6%, leading index lower
item.description: Hedera (HBAR), down 1.3% from Wednesday, joined Internet Computer (ICP) as an underperformer.

item.title: Bitcoin’s ‘less aggressive demand’ may lead to months of consolidation: Analysis
item.description: Bitcoin demand and ETF flows weaken as BTC struggles below $80,000, raising risks of prolonged consolidation or a drop toward $65,000.

item.title: Stablecoins retain the edge over tokenized money market funds, JPMorgan says
item.description: The bank said tokenized money market funds account for only about 5% of the broader stablecoin universe despite offering yield.

item.title: The way to save Ethereum: The community needs to create an organization that's economically aligned with Ethereum and accountable to it. The EF now holds less than 0.1% of all ETH. There is no flow of Ethereum staking or fee revenues to it. If we want to g - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXEFVX3lxTFBzVFVCUU9WdDhsMEp4VzY1elNvdk4xdER2VjhrTlVLQ2RhWkZkcXdLLXFyTWRmZ1F5MUVUMFVSWVZoU2hZbjZFWGdhaVJNeUtCTGlmLTBIQ3RzWmJi?oc=5" target="_blank">The way to save Ethereum: The community ne…

item.title: Terraform Accuses Jane Street of Using Insider Telegram Group Ahead of $40B UST-LUNA Collapse
item.description: New allegations claim that Jane Street made use of a private backchannel with Terraform insiders before Terra's collapse.

item.title: Jane Street accused of using Terra Telegram backchannel before UST crash
item.description: The private Telegram backchannel allegedly allowed Jane Street to unwind hundreds of millions in potential exposure “mere hours before” the Terra ecosystem’s $40 billion collapse.

item.title: I think Ethereum’s original sin was not considering tokenomics with every move it made from Dencun on. The ultrasound money thesis was a good one and with Dencun (or the L2 roadmap generally) they should have stopped to say that this was going to hurt t - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE5EMm1WZVNVbHc4U1pBZjRWTmJGYmtJN2FaVmxSMTduLUlBU0hsNVg1cUdwLTV2WkNoMGY1T015bWRaWGsxQWp5N3UxRjJhOUUtV00xRDhDUFZmcGNhSHRN?oc=5" target="_blank">I think Ethereum’s original sin was no…

item.title: Boerse Stuttgart taps SocGen, flatexDEGIRO for EU blockchain settlement push
item.description: Boerse Stuttgart’s Seturion has partnered with Societe Generale, SG-FORGE and flatexDEGIRO to build a pan-European blockchain securities settlement system.

item.title: Morning Minute: SpaceX Files for IPO, Shares Surprising BTC Portfolio
item.description: SpaceX is up over 100% on its BTC holdings. Hyperliquid is decoupling from crypto majors. And Ethereum is leaning hard into privacy.

item.title: Fed seeks input on limited payment accounts after Trump order
item.description: The US Federal Reserve proposed a limited “skinny” payment account framework for fintech and crypto firms and called for a temporary pause on Tier 3 applications.

item.title: It's not all HYPE: Privacy and quantum-resistant coins advance as bitcoin coasts
item.description: Your day-ahead look for May 21, 2026

item.title: 🇰🇷 LATEST: South Korea’s crypto tax abolition petition surpassed 52,000 signatures and reached the National Assembly. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE5WUVZjNUdrTGlyeU1IT2ptWXpnejRJdlQ1dVFnSHBWUEdmWEkzNTR2d3JCcWZOaXpTb1lxUHNjTV83bFpkNXFBUk9TNFRGblZ0UVpkeWNZSG55MWt1SkVqVE9sYVc?oc=5" target="_blank">🇰🇷 LATEST: South Korea’s cryp…

item.title: The $6 billion expiration countdown: Traders pile into $82,000 bitcoin calls ahead of May 29 expiry
item.description: Deribit’s bitcoin open interest has overtaken BlackRock’s IBIT as traders brace for a showdown between $75K max pain and $80K call positioning.
